constructors.name: TextEntity()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the TextEntity class.

methods.name: ClearPropertyOverrides
methods.summary: Clears all overridden properties for this annotation

methods.name: ComponentIndex
methods.summary: If this piece of geometry is a component in something larger, like a BrepEdge in a Brep, then this function returns the component index.

returns.doc: This object's component index. If this object is not a sub-piece of a larger geometric entity, then the returned index has m_type = ComponentIndex.InvalidType and m_index = -1.

methods.name: ConstructConstObject
methods.signature: protected void ConstructConstObject(Object parentObject, int subobjectIndex)
methods.summary: Assigns a parent object and a sub-object index to this.

methods.name: Create
methods.signature: public static TextEntity Create(string text, Plane plane, DimensionStyle style, bool wrapped, double rectWidth, double rotationRadians)
methods.summary: Create Text geometry or null if input is invalid

methods.name: CreateCurves
methods.signature: public Curve[] CreateCurves(DimensionStyle dimstyle, bool bAllowOpen, double smallCapsScale = 1, double spacing = 0)
methods.summary: Returns the outline curves.

params.name: bAllowOpen
params.doc: Set to true to prevent forced closing of open curves retrieved from glyphs.

params.name: smallCapsScale
params.doc: Set to create small caps out of lower case letters.

params.name: spacing
params.doc: Set to add additional spacing between glyph output.

returns.doc: An array of curves that forms the outline or content of this text entity.

methods.name: CreateExtrusions
methods.signature: public Extrusion[] CreateExtrusions(DimensionStyle dimstyle, double height, double smallCapsScale = 1, double spacing = 0)
methods.summary: Creates extrusions from the outline curves with specified height.

params.name: height
params.doc: Height in direction perpendicular to plane of text.

params.name: smallCapsScale
params.doc: Set to create small caps out of lower case letters.

params.name: spacing
params.doc: Set to add additional spacing between glyph output.

methods.name: CreatePolySurfaces
methods.signature: public Brep[] CreatePolySurfaces(DimensionStyle dimstyle, double height, double smallCapsScale = 1, double spacing = 0)
methods.summary: Creates breps from the outline curves with specified height.

params.name: height
params.doc: Height in direction perpendicular to plane of text.

params.name: smallCapsScale
params.doc: Set to create small caps out of lower case letters.

params.name: spacing
params.doc: Set to add additional spacing between glyph output.

methods.name: CreateSurfaces
methods.signature: public Brep[] CreateSurfaces(DimensionStyle dimstyle, double smallCapsScale = 1, double spacing = 0)
methods.summary: Creates planar breps from the outline curves.

params.name: smallCapsScale
params.doc: Set to create small caps out of lower case letters.

params.name: spacing
params.doc: Set to add additional spacing between glyph output.

methods.name: CreateWithRichText
methods.signature: public static TextEntity CreateWithRichText(string richTextString, Plane plane, DimensionStyle style, bool wrapped, double rectWidth, double rotationRadians)
methods.summary: Create RichText geometry or null if input is invalid

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Actively reclaims unmanaged resources that this instance uses.

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: Overridden in order to destroy local display cache information

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: Duplicate
methods.summary: Constructs a deep (full) copy of this object.

returns.doc: An object of the same type as this, with the same properties and behavior.

methods.name: DuplicateShallow
methods.summary: Constructs a light copy of this object. By "light", it is meant that the same underlying data is used until something is done to attempt to change it. For example, you could have a shallow copy of a very heavy mesh object and the same underlying data will be used when doing things like inspecting the number of faces on the mesh. If you modify the location of one of the mesh vertices, the shallow copy will create a full duplicate of the underlying mesh data and the shallow copy will become a deep copy.

returns.doc: An object of the same type as this object. This behavior is overridden by implementing classes.

methods.name: EnsurePrivateCopy
methods.summary: If you want to keep a copy of this class around by holding onto it in a variable after a command completes, call EnsurePrivateCopy to make sure that this class is not tied to the document. You can call this function as many times as you want.

methods.name: Explode
methods.summary: Explodes this text entity into an array of curves.

returns.doc: An array of curves that forms the outline or content of this text entity.

methods.name: Finalize
methods.summary: Passively reclaims unmanaged resources when the class user did not explicitly call Dispose().

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Boolean)
methods.summary: Bounding box solver. Gets the world axis aligned bounding box for the geometry.

params.name: accurate
params.doc: If true, a physically accurate bounding box will be computed. If not, a bounding box estimate will be computed. For some geometry types there is no difference between the estimate and the accurate bounding box. Estimated bounding boxes can be computed much (much) faster than accurate (or "tight") bounding boxes. Estimated bounding boxes are always similar to or larger than accurate bounding boxes.

returns.doc: The bounding box of the geometry in world coordinates or BoundingBox.Empty if not bounding box could be found.

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Plane)
methods.summary: Aligned Bounding box solver. Gets the plane aligned bounding box.

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Transform)
methods.summary: Aligned bounding box solver. Gets the world axis aligned bounding box for the transformed geometry.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transformation to apply to bounding box after calculation. The geometry is not modified.

returns.doc: The bounding box of the transformed geometry in world coordinates or BoundingBox.Empty if not bounding box could be found.

methods.name: GetBoundingBox(Plane, Box)
methods.signature: public BoundingBox GetBoundingBox(Plane plane, out Box worldBox)
methods.summary: Aligned Bounding box solver. Gets the plane aligned bounding box.

methods.name: GetDimensionStyle
methods.summary: Return the proper dimension style from which to get properties for this annotation object If this object has style overrides, those will be included in the returned dimension style and the style will be updated to include the current state of the parent style for non-overridden fields

methods.name: GetObjectData
methods.signature: public virtual void GetObjectData(SerializationInfo info, StreamingContext context)
methods.summary: Populates a System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo with the data needed to serialize the target object.

methods.name: GetPlainTextWithRunMap
methods.summary: Return plain text string for this annotation with field expressions unevaluated.

params.name: map
params.doc: an array of int values in groups of 3: run index, character start position, and length.

methods.name: GetTextTransform
methods.signature: public Transform GetTextTransform(double textscale, DimensionStyle dimstyle)
methods.summary: Get the transform for this text object's text geometry

methods.name: GetUserString
methods.summary: Gets user string from this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve the string.

returns.doc: string associated with the key if successful. null if no key was found.

methods.name: GetUserStrings
methods.summary: Gets a copy of all (user key string, user value string) pairs attached to this geometry.

methods.name: IsAllBold
methods.summary: Returns true if all of the text in the annotation is Bold, otherwise returns false

methods.name: IsAllItalic
methods.summary: Returns true if all of the text in the annotation is Italic, otherwise returns false

methods.name: IsAllUnderlined
methods.summary: Returns true if all of the text in the annotation is Underlined, otherwise returns false

methods.name: IsPropertyOverridden
methods.summary: Returns true if a property is overridden

methods.name: IsValidWithLog
methods.summary: Determines if an object is valid. Also provides a report on errors if this object happens not to be valid.

params.name: log
params.doc: A textual log. This out parameter is assigned during this call.

returns.doc: true if this object is valid; false otherwise.

methods.name: MakeDeformable
methods.summary: If possible, converts the object into a form that can be accurately modified with "squishy" transformations like projections, shears, an non-uniform scaling.

returns.doc: false if object cannot be converted to a deformable object. true if object was already deformable or was converted into a deformable object.

methods.name: MemoryEstimate
methods.summary: Computes an estimate of the number of bytes that this object is using in memory.

methods.name: NonConstOperation
methods.summary: Destroy cache handle

methods.name: OnSwitchToNonConst
methods.summary: Is called when a non-constant operation occurs.

methods.name: Rotate
methods.signature: public bool Rotate(double angleRadians, Vector3d rotationAxis, Point3d rotationCenter)
methods.summary: Rotates the object about the specified axis. A positive rotation angle results in a counter-clockwise rotation about the axis (right hand rule).

params.name: rotationAxis
params.doc: Direction of the axis of rotation.

params.name: rotationCenter
params.doc: Point on the axis of rotation.

methods.name: RunReplace
methods.signature: public bool RunReplace(string replaceString, int startRunIndex, int startRunPosition, int endRunIndex, int endRunPosition)
methods.summary: Replace text within a formatted string

methods.name: Scale
methods.summary: Scales the object by the specified factor. The scale is centered at the origin.

methods.name: SetBold
methods.summary: (Inherited from AnnotationBase.)

methods.name: SetFacename
methods.signature: public virtual bool SetFacename(bool set_on, string facename)
methods.summary: (Inherited from AnnotationBase.)

methods.name: SetItalic
methods.summary: (Inherited from AnnotationBase.)

methods.name: SetOverrideDimStyle
methods.summary: Set a style including overrides for this annotation object. The DimensionStyle OverrideStyle must have the override fields marked as overridden and must have it's Id set to nil. Use DimensinoStyle.SetFieldOverride(Field field) and related functions to manage override settings. To override a field, the field value must be set and the field must be marked as an override. The DimensionStyle passed in here must not be in the dimstyle table

methods.name: SetRichText
methods.signature: public void SetRichText(string rtfText, DimensionStyle dimstyle)
methods.summary: (Inherited from AnnotationBase.)

methods.name: SetUnderline
methods.summary: (Inherited from AnnotationBase.)

methods.name: SetUserString
methods.signature: public bool SetUserString(string key, string value)
methods.summary: Attach a user string (key,value combination) to this geometry.

params.name: key
params.doc: id used to retrieve this string.

methods.name: ToJSON
methods.summary: Create a JSON string representation of this object

methods.name: Transform(Transform)
methods.summary: Transforms the geometry. If the input Transform has a SimilarityType of OrientationReversing, you may want to consider flipping the transformed geometry after calling this function when it makes sense. For example, you may want to call Flip() on a Brep after transforming it.

methods.name: Transform(Transform, DimensionStyle)
methods.signature: public bool Transform(Transform transform, DimensionStyle style)
methods.summary: Transform the object by a 4x4 transform matrix and change text height override to accommodate scaling in the transform if necessary

params.name: transform
params.doc: An Transform with the transformation information

returns.doc: Returns true on success otherwise returns false.

methods.name: Translate(Vector3d)
methods.summary: Translates the object along the specified vector.

methods.name: Translate(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public bool Translate(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Translates the object along the specified vector.

methods.name: WrapText
methods.summary: Wrap text

properties.name: AlternateDimensionLengthDisplay
properties.summary: Alternate length display units and format

properties.name: AnnotationType
properties.summary: Type of annotation

properties.name: DecimalSeparator
properties.summary: Set or get the decimal separator c

properties.name: DimensionLengthDisplay
properties.summary: Length display units and format

properties.name: DimensionScale
properties.summary: Gets or sets the dimension scale

properties.name: DimensionStyle
properties.summary: If there are no overrides then the parent style is returned otherwise the dimension style saved with the annotation is returned.

properties.name: DimensionStyleId
properties.summary: Id of this annotation's parent dimstyle If this annotation has overrides to dimstyle properties, those overrides will be represented in the DimensionStyle returned by DimensionStyle(ParentStyle)

properties.name: Disposed
properties.summary: Indicates if this object has been disposed or the document it originally belonged to has been disposed.

properties.name: DrawForward
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the text is oriented towards the reader when viewed from behind

properties.name: DrawTextFrame
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether to draw a frame around a text mask

properties.name: FirstCharFont
properties.summary: Returns the font used by the first run of text in an annotation

properties.name: Font
properties.summary: The base Font for the text of the annotation. The text string is rich text and therefore a different font that the base font can be associated with sub strings of the text

properties.name: FormatWidth
properties.summary: Text format width (Wrapping rectangle)

properties.name: HasBrepForm
properties.summary: Returns true if the Brep.TryConvertBrep function will be successful for this object

properties.name: HasPropertyOverrides
properties.summary: (Inherited from AnnotationBase.)

properties.name: HasUserData
properties.summary: Gets true if this class has any custom information attached to it through UserData.

properties.name: IsDeformable
properties.summary: true if object can be accurately modified with "squishy" transformations like projections, shears, and non-uniform scaling.

properties.name: IsDocumentControlled
properties.summary: If true this object may not be modified. Any properties or functions that attempt to modify this object when it is set to "IsReadOnly" will throw a NotSupportedException.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Tests an object to see if it is valid.

properties.name: Justification
properties.summary: Gets or sets the justification of text in relation to its base point.

properties.name: MaskColor
properties.summary: Color to use for drawing a text mask when it is enabled. If the mask is enabled and MaskColor is System.Drawing.Color.Transparent, then the viewport's color will be used for the MaskColor

properties.name: MaskColorSource
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the mask background color is from the background or from a color

properties.name: MaskEnabled
properties.summary: Determines whether or not to draw a Text Mask

properties.name: MaskFrame
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether to draw a frame around a text mask

properties.name: MaskOffset
properties.summary: Offset for the border around text of the rectangle used to draw the mask. This value multiplied by TextHeight is the offset on each side of the tight rectangle around the text characters to the mask rectangle. The default value is 0.1.

properties.name: MaskUsesViewportColor
properties.summary: If true, the viewport's color is used for the mask color. If false, the color defined by MaskColor is used

properties.name: ObjectType
properties.summary: Useful for switch statements that need to differentiate between basic object types like points, curves, surfaces, and so on.

properties.name: ParentDimensionStyle
properties.summary: The parent dimension style associated with this annotation

properties.name: PlainText
properties.summary: Text stripped of RTF formatting information

properties.name: PlainTextWithFields
properties.summary: Text stripped of RTF formatting information and with field expressions intact

properties.name: Plane
properties.summary: Plane that this annotation lies on

properties.name: RichText
properties.summary: Text including additional RTF formatting information

properties.name: Text
properties.summary: Text including additional RTF formatting information

properties.name: TextFormula
properties.summary: See RichText

properties.name: TextHasRtfFormatting
properties.summary: (Inherited from AnnotationBase.)

properties.name: TextHeight
properties.summary: AnnotationBase.TextHeight Gets the parent dimstyle for the annotation and gets or sets the text height in the dimstyle

properties.name: TextIsWrapped
properties.summary: Is text wrapping on

properties.name: TextModelWidth
properties.summary: Width of text in the model

properties.name: TextRotationDegrees
properties.summary: Rotation of text in degrees

properties.name: TextRotationRadians
properties.summary: Rotation of text in radians

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: List of custom information that is attached to this class.

properties.name: UserDictionary
properties.summary: Dictionary of custom information attached to this class. The dictionary is actually user data provided as an easy to use sharable set of information.

properties.name: UserStringCount
properties.summary: Gets the amount of user strings.
